rules.name: exact-title-boost
rules.condition: query exactly matches a book title

rules.name: ethiopian-canon-boost
rules.condition: query contains enoch OR jubilees OR meqabyan OR ethiopian canon

rules.name: mirror-water-fire-boost
rules.condition: query contains reflection OR cleansing OR transformation

rules.name: video-supported-boost
rules.condition: doc has linked video and transcript
